CHICAGO, Nov. 20-As sufficient
tonnage has been guaranteed the
Milwaukee road to make the ven
ture paying one from the start,
the management is making a phe-
nomenal race to reach the Pacific
coast with it's rails.


1t became known today that rep
resentatives of many commercial
associations and of associations of
manufacturing interests have sent
delegations to the Milwaukee man.
agement urging haste and giving a
guarantee of large amounts of ton
mage the moment the Pacific coast
extension of the road is complete
and ready for business.


1t Is therefore rare prize which
the Milwaukee Is racing to possess
and If the present weather con-
tinued record in track laying and
road construction will be made.
